nasb.text: Be miserable and mourn and weep; let your laughter be turned into mourning and your joy to gloom.

esv.text: Be wretched and mourn and weep. Let your laughter be turned to mourning and your joy to gloom.

cnv.text: 你們要愁苦、悲哀、哭泣，把歡笑變為傷痛，把快樂變為憂愁。

ccb.text: 你们要悲伤、忧愁、痛哭，转欢笑为悲哀，变欢乐为愁苦。

csbs.text: 你们应当难过、悲伤、痛哭；把你们的欢笑变为悲伤，快乐变为忧闷。
